subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, Who hath sanctified the world from the word of negation and guided it unto the City of affirmation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که عالم را از کلمه لا مقدس نموده بمدینه الا هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consultation, @wisdom [hikmat]
